senses.gloss: path one takes to reach a goal
a piece rope attached to the side of a bigger rope

examples.text: إِنَّ ٱلْمُنَـٰفِقِينَ فِى ٱلدَّرْكِ ٱلْأَسْفَلِ مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ وَلَن تَجِدَ لَهُمْ نَصِيرًا
examples.english: Surely the hypocrites will be in the lowest depths of the Fire—and you will never find for them any helper.

senses.gloss: to last, to continue (of periodic rains)

etymology.text: From the root د ر ك (d r k). Cognate with Hebrew דרך (dereḵ) and Aramaic דְּרַךְ (dəraḵ, “to tread”).
